summary: Tally-Style Receipt Allocation & Invoice Immutability Testing - 12/12 backend tests PASSED, Frontend verified working. All core features functional.

minor.issue: Minor React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in ListCustomers component - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Ledger-authoritative balance calculation in customer.js (lines 138-191) correctly uses double-entry ledger when available
Good: Receipt allocation controller (receiptAllocation.js) correctly validates payment and invoice amounts before allocation
Good: Over-allocation prevention works for both payment limit and invoice limit scenarios
Good: Invoice immutability guard in order.js (line 377-385) correctly rejects direct paidAmount/dueAmount/paymentStatus changes
Good: On-Account payment behavior (payment.js lines 272-276) correctly stays unallocated without auto-FIFO
Good: Customer detail dialog shows derived invoice dues from receipt allocations
Good: Allocate tab in customer dialog correctly shows unallocated receipts and unpaid invoices for manual bill-wise reconciliation
seed_data_creation: Multiple test customers created with prefix TEST_Alloc_, TEST_OverPay_, TEST_OverInv_, TEST_Immut_, TEST_OnAcc_, TEST_GetAlloc_, TEST_InvAlloc_ for testing receipt allocation scenarios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tally-style receipt allocation is fully working. Key behaviors verified: 1) Receipt allocation against specific invoices works (Against Ref), 2) Over-allocation prevention for both payment and invoice limits, 3) Invoice immutability guard blocks direct paidAmount/dueAmount/paymentStatus changes, 4) On-Account payments stay unallocated (no auto-FIFO), 5) Customer balances use ledger-authoritative source when available, 6) Frontend Customer Ledger page with detail dialog shows Invoices, Receipts, and Allocate tabs correctly.

PASSED: Customer list page loads with correct balances (GET /api/customers/with-balance)
Customer detail shows balance source (ledger vs orders fallback)
Customer detail Invoices tab shows derived paid/due amounts from receipt allocations
Customer detail Receipts tab shows allocated/unallocated amounts
Customer detail Allocate tab works (shows unallocated receipts and unpaid invoices)
POST /api/receipts/allocate - receipt allocation against invoices works
Receipt allocation over-allocation prevention (payment amount exceeded)
Receipt allocation over-allocation prevention (invoice amount exceeded)
Invoice immutability guard - PUT /api/orders/:id rejects paidAmount changes
Invoice immutability guard - PUT /api/orders/:id rejects dueAmount changes
Invoice immutability guard - PUT /api/orders/:id rejects paymentStatus changes
GET /api/customers/:id/transactions returns derived invoice dues and payment allocation data
POST /api/payments with customer payment without referenceId stays as On Account (no auto-FIFO)

frontend_verification.customer_ledger_page: PASS - Shows Total Receivable, Advance Received, Total Customers, Net Position
frontend_verification.customer_detail_dialog: PASS - Opens with tabs: Invoices, Receipts, Allocate
frontend_verification.invoices_tab: PASS - Shows invoice with Total, Paid, Due, Status columns
frontend_verification.receipts_tab: PASS - Shows Receipt #, Date, Amount, Allocated, Unallocated columns
frontend_verification.allocate_tab: PASS - Shows message for manual bill-wise reconciliation
